response.original_title: ヌードモデルNTR 上司と羞恥に溺れた妻の衝撃的浮気映像 - 北川遥
response.overview: This...this wasn't supposed to happen... Three years into my marriage to my wife, Haruka, I worked as an editor for a women's magazine and was in charge of the famous photographer, Mr. Oshima. We had prepared everything perfectly for the popular "Love and Sex Special Issue," featuring a popular model (Shiro Kitayama). However, Mr. Oshima declared that he was tired of professional female models, and by chance, he saw a photograph of Haruka displayed on my desk and took a liking to her. I couldn't flatly refuse Mr. Oshima's request, as we were on good terms, so my wife agreed to participate in the shoot on the condition that it would only be once.
response.title: Nude Model NTR: Shocking Footage of a Wife's Affair with Her Boss, Drowning in Shame - Haruka Kitagawa
